_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater on every miner startup. Bump version + sha256 + url whenever a new btx-gbt-solve is published. Set min_required_sha256 to enforce a hard floor at fork boundaries — miners on a different SHA will refuse to mine until they upgrade (unless DEXBTX_NO_SOLVER_AUTOUPDATE=1).
notes: LTO-enabled rebuild against BTX v0.32.2 source. Restores share_target_override, activates nMatMulNonceSeedHeight=125000. ~3-5x throughput vs the initial non-LTO v0.32.2 build.
